title: Update vendor of containers/storage
body:

comments.body:
[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *rhatdan* The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands?repo=containers%2Fbuildah). The pull request process is described [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process)
Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/buildah/blob/main/OWNERS)~~ [rhatdan] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment

@giuseppe @vrothberg @nalind @flouthoc 
Vendoring of containers/storage is causing errors in Containerized integration.  Any ideas?

In both cases the error ends up including
```
Error loading container config when searching for local runtime
```
which as near as I can tell, could only be triggered if `github.com/containers/storage/pkg/unshare.IsRootless()` returned `true` for some reason.

To the best of my understanding, the container in which these tests are running both has `CAP_SYS_ADMIN` (the container is being started with `--cap-add=all`) and the default host ID mappings (one of the tests `cat`s the `/proc/self/uid_map` from inside of a chroot environment, and the log shows the default mappings, and they can only be inherited from a user namespace with the default mappings), so I must be missing something.

CI goes green by reverting some commits , I tested CI with https://github.com/flouthoc/storage/tree/test-fix-2 and it went green and it included revert of `975fab1023f74c7b9787323deca2250a82469e98` as well but I am trying to confirm exact commit with another push.
Its not only `975fab1023f74c7b9787323deca2250a82469e98` but CI goes green when i revert three commits https://github.com/containers/storage/compare/main...flouthoc:storage:test-fix-2
